API_UNDO_FAILED.description: restore transaction failed and fail-closed recovery runs

API_VERSION_OR_BINDING_NOT_FOUND.description: API version or Environment binding absent

CALLBACK_REPLAYED.description: OIDC callback state/code was already consumed

CSRF_INVALID.description: missing, expired or mismatched CSRF token

DEFINITION_SCHEMA_INVALID.description: saved definition cannot be validated structurally

ENVIRONMENT_PRECONDITION_FAILED.description: create/update precondition does not match Environment existence

HOST_OR_RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND.description: Host or selected resource absent in scope

IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_REUSED.description: same scoped key used with a different payload hash

IDEMPOTENCY_RESPONSE_TOO_LARGE.description: projected successful response exceeds 65,536 bytes; coordinator rolls back before commit

IMPACT_TOKEN_INVALID.description: impact token absent, expired, mismatched or stale

INVALID_BODY.description: API request body invalid for selected type

INVALID_COMMAND.description: unsupported resource command or missing command discriminator

INVALID_DATE_RANGE.description: history range invalid or exceeds 30 days

INVALID_METHOD.description: HTTP method invalid or not allowlisted

INVALID_PATH.description: API path is not a valid relative path

INVALID_REQUEST.description: malformed syntax, identifier or body envelope

INVALID_RETURN_URL.description: login return URL is not same-origin/allowlisted

INVALID_TARGET_CIDR_SET.description: target CIDR set is absent, empty, malformed, duplicated, excludes current base-URL resolution, or its ref/Host/Environment/hash does not match the signed Approved Address Set manifest

INVALID_URL.description: Environment base URL violates HTTPS/format policy

KEY_PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE.description: secret-manager key operation unavailable/timed out; Retry-After required

LOGIN_ALREADY_ACTIVE.description: login initiation conflicts with active login state

POLL_RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.description: execution polling rate exceeded; Retry-After required

RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.description: actor/route request rate exceeded; Retry-After required

REPORT_STALE.description: report does not match current saved version

RESOURCE_NOT_EMPTY.description: non-empty resource cannot be removed by command

RESTORE_COLLISION.description: original tree location/name cannot be restored safely

REVIEW_STALE.description: recovery review no longer matches current definition

SCHEMA_IN_USE.description: schema key removal would orphan Environment values

SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.description: required dependency, bulkhead or process capacity is transiently unavailable; Retry-After required

SESSION_CLAIMS_INVALID.description: stored actor or MFA claims cannot produce the exact versioned session projection

SESSION_STORE_UNAVAILABLE.description: server-side session store unavailable; Retry-After required

SNAPSHOT_INVALID.description: immutable run snapshot cannot be created

TREE_CYCLE.description: move would create an ancestry cycle

VERSION_NOT_CURRENT.description: validation target is not current saved version

VERSION_NOT_IN_WORKFLOW.description: requested version belongs to another Workflow

WARNING_ACK_REQUIRED.description: current report has Warning findings without confirmation

WORKFLOW_CAPACITY_REACHED.description: 20 Workflow executions already active; Retry-After required

WORKFLOW_OR_API_VERSION_NOT_FOUND.description: Workflow or referenced API version absent

WORKFLOW_VERSION_REPORT_OR_BINDING_NOT_F.description: Workflow version, report or binding absent
